title: Settings
loginSyncMessage: Log in to sync settings across devices.

general.title: General Settings
general.fontPreviewDescription: Serif fonts used in Paper theme
general.emailNotificationsNote: Payment and security alerts are always sent

beta.title: Beta Features
beta.description: Try new features before they're released

ai.title: AI Settings
ai.description: Information about the AI used for entry analysis
ai.autoDescription: Uses Gemini 2.5 Flash by default, with GPT-5 Mini as fallback

empathyMode.title: Empathy Mode
empathyMode.description: Choose the emotional closeness of analysis
empathyMode.distancedDescription: Observe without over-explaining, insight with brevity
empathyMode.closerDescription: Feel what you feel like it's my own, and just be here with you
empathyMode.closerWarning: This mode responds like a close friend with deeper emotional reflection. It does not replace professional counseling.

provider.title: AI Provider Settings
provider.description: Choose an AI provider for entry analysis.
provider.saveSuccessMessage: AI provider has been changed to {{name}}.
provider.autoDescription: Automatically selects the best AI model for the situation
provider.saveErrorMessage: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.socialNicknameHint: Social login users can change their nickname in the linked account settings.

security.title: Security Settings
security.description: Change your password or manage security settings.
security.emailMethod: Receive password reset link via email (Recommended)
security.emailMethodDescription: Receive a password reset link via email to change your password securely.
security.emailSentSuccess: Password reset link has been sent to your email.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Manage your data protection and privacy settings.
privacy.encryptionDescription: All entry content is protected with AES-256 encryption.
privacy.dataExportDescription: Export your entries and analysis results to a file.
privacy.exportEmailNotice: Download link will be sent to your email (valid for 7 days)
privacy.exportSuccessMessage: We've sent a download link to your email. Please check your inbox!
privacy.exportPendingMessage: A request is already in progress. Please check your email.
privacy.dataDeleteDescription: Permanently delete all data associated with your account.

social.title: Social Login Account
social.profileMessage: users can change their nickname in the linked service's account settings.
social.securityMessage: users can change their password in the linked service's account settings.
social.kakaoPath: Kakao Account Settings → Security → Change Password
social.defaultPath: Change your password in the linked service's account settings.
